scenarios.description: valueOf with null tagName throws NullPointerException on Validate.notNull
pseudocode: TEST TC06 valueOf null-tagName throws NPE
// Reflection access to package-private valueOf(String, String, String, ParseSettings)
Method m = Tag.class.getDeclaredMethod("valueOf", String.class, String.class, String.class, ParseSettings.class);
call m.invoke(null, tagName, normalName, namespace, settings);

scenarios.description: valueOf with empty tagName throws IllegalArgumentException on Validate.notEmpty
pseudocode: TEST TC07 valueOf empty-tagName throws IAE
Method m = Tag.class.getDeclaredMethod("valueOf", String.class, String.class, String.class, ParseSettings.class);
String tagName = "  "; // blanks after trim => empty
call m.invoke(null, tagName, normalName, namespace, settings);

scenarios.description: Public valueOf with preserveTagCase=false returns known 'pre' tag and isFormSubmittable=false
scenarios.expectedResult: tag name normalized to 'pre' and isFormSubmittable()==false
pseudocode: TEST TC08 valueOf uppercase-pre with preserveLowerCase

scenarios.description: Clone branch with preserveTagCase=true on known form-submittable tag yields isFormSubmittable=true
scenarios.expectedResult: cloned tag retains case and formSubmit==true
pseudocode: Method m = Tag.class.getDeclaredMethod("valueOf", String.class, String.class, String.class, ParseSettings.class);
Tag t = (Tag) m.invoke(null, tagName, normalName, namespace, settings);
